title: General Aptitude - Analytical Aptitude - General Awareness

questions.question:
\( \text{LBDQ} \) stands for:



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 133

The two types of attitudes in a workplace can be termed as ___________.



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist C | Section E | Question: 146

Directions: Answer questions (24-25) on the basis of following instructions :

Instructions: For the Assertions \( \text{(A)} \) and Reason \( \text{(R)} \) below, choose the correct alternative from the following :

(I) Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true and \( \text{(R)} \) is the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \).

(II) Both \( \text{(A)} \) and \( \text{(R)} \) are true and \( \text{(R)} \) is not the correct explanation of \( \text{(A)} \).

(III) \( \text{(A)} \) is true but \( \text{(R)} \) is false.

(IV) \( \text{(A)} \) is false but \( \text{(R)} \) is true.

Assertion \( \text{(A)} \): Salt is added to cook food at higher altitudes.

Reason \( \text{(R)} \): Temperature is lower at higher altitudes.



Analytical Aptitude: NIELIT 2023 Feb Scientist D | Section A | Question: 25
